notes: Testnet-friendly defaults. Shim got 5000 DIR before because perUserCapWei was 5000 DIR and the demo used almost the whole emissions balance as one epoch pool. At scale: use --pool-wei set to a small budget per epoch (e.g. daily emissions), not --fetch-pool of the entire treasury; set perUserCapWei to a small fraction of that epoch pool so millions of active users each earn a tiny slice unless content is extreme outliers.
